text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae and Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan Sensei! Teach us how to get more
Umazings!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh come on, you don't have to call me that! ♪
But okay, I can tell you both a thing or two.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Look for interesting things that people can't stop
looking at!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Put yourselves in the shoes of your fans, and think
of things that they'll want to keep their eyes on!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So for an Umadol... That could be practice
videos! Maybe they'd want to see my prep for the
next concert!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If they see how hard I'm working every day, they'll
end up wanting to see me live even more!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
What would fans of a Tomakomai local idol want
to see...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Maybe the town ramen shop rankings?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I'll throw in my own bowl reports with the
rankings. That should keep people coming back!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
People will flock to Tomakomai from all over just
to try the local delicacies, and to think that it
might all be thanks to ramen!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeah, I think it'd be hard to keep eyes off of
that, so sounds good! ☆ Surprising and new ideas
are also a driving force behind Umazings! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: If that sounds good, then off I go!
